summary: Comprehensive testing completed for FinRomania Auth & New Features integration. All backend APIs working perfectly (17/17 tests passed) including auth, watchlist, portfolio, newsletter, search, and admin endpoints. Frontend fully functional with proper authentication flow, protected routes, and seamless user experience.

design_issues.issue: Images missing alt text for accessibility

passed_tests: ✅ Backend Auth API - All 17 endpoints working (100% success rate)
✅ Auth Session Management - Test user creation, authentication, and cleanup working
✅ Watchlist CRUD - Add, get, remove items with proper user isolation
✅ Portfolio Management - Holdings, transactions, summary calculations working
✅ Newsletter Subscription - Email collection and status tracking working
✅ Search API - Stock and news search with proper filtering
✅ Admin Dashboard - Statistics and user management for admin users
✅ Protected Routes - Proper 401 responses for unauthenticated access
✅ Homepage Components - Ticker bar, BVB stocks, news, currencies, newsletter card
✅ Authentication Flow - Login button redirects to Emergent auth correctly
✅ Access Control - Watchlist and Portfolio show login required for unauthenticated users
✅ Stock Detail Pages - Charts, watchlist buttons, and social share working
✅ Newsletter Frontend - Subscription form integration working
✅ Navigation - All page navigation working correctly
✅ News Articles - Loading and clickable article links
✅ Search Functionality - Frontend search integration working
✅ Responsive Design - Mobile viewport and layout working
✅ Dark Mode Toggle - Theme switching functionality working
✅ Footer Links - Privacy policy and other legal pages working

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (All core functionality working, minor accessibility improvement needed)
